summary: Iteration 3 E2E test PASSES. Backend 11/11 pytest cases pass against public URL: streaming SSE works end-to-end (text/event-stream content-type, multiple {"delta":"..."} chunks, terminates with [DONE]), CORS allows *.github.io (preflight from https://test.github.io returns 200 with Access-Control-Allow-Origin echoing the origin), CORS still allows localhost:3000, malformed body returns 422, all legacy endpoints (/api/health, /api/chat, /api/chat/regenerate, /api/chat/continue, /api/chat/summarize, /api/chat/extract-memories, /api/chat/emotion) continue to work with the new thinking:disabled default. Frontend HashRouter active (URLs use /#/settings and /#/chat/seed-kira). Gallery loads at root, Chat composer renders, Settings shows Diagnóstico section with data-testid='diag-api-url' = https://deepseek-roleplay.preview.emergentagent.com and model = deepseek-v4-flash. data-testid='streaming-toggle' present, defaults to checked. Typewriter streaming verified: sending a message with streaming ON produced 8 distinct text-length growth steps (315->561 chars over ~2.5s); after toggling streaming OFF, the same flow produced only 2 steps (single jump 568->694) confirming non-streaming mode. Continuar button still renders. config.js exports API_BASE_URL, API, API_PREFIX, DEEPSEEK_MODEL, ROUTER_BASENAME. constants.js re-exports them. api.js uses API from config (no hardcoded URLs) and exports async generator chatStream().

minor.issue: X-Accel-Buffering: no header is set by server.py but stripped by the Cloudflare edge in front of the preview URL. Cache-Control is also rewritten by CF from 'no-cache, no-transform' to 'no-store, no-cache, must-revalidate'. Streaming still works end-to-end (Transfer-Encoding: chunked is preserved), but on Render/Railway/own-domain deployments verify the header survives — it matters for nginx proxies.

backend: POST /api/chat/stream -> 200, content-type=text/event-stream, >=2 delta chunks, terminates with [DONE]
OPTIONS /api/chat with Origin: https://test.github.io -> 200/204, Access-Control-Allow-Origin echoes origin (regex matches *.github.io)
frontend: HashRouter: root URL loads Gallery (Kira Vex + 'Nuevo personaje' visible)
HashRouter: /#/settings renders Settings page with sliders + advanced section
Settings Diagnóstico section: data-testid='diag-api-url' = https://deepseek-roleplay.preview.emergentagent.com, model = deepseek-v4-flash
Streaming toggle data-testid='streaming-toggle' present, default state=checked
Streaming ON: 8 progressive text-length growth steps observed in ~2.5s (typewriter effect confirmed)
Streaming OFF (after toggle): only 2 growth steps (single large jump) — confirms non-streaming path
Continuar button (data-testid='continue-chat-button') still appears after AI reply
config.js logs '[config] API base URL: https://deepseek-roleplay.preview.emergentagent.com' to console — proves env variable cascade works

critical_code_review_comments: server.py /api/chat/stream correctly translates DeepSeek OpenAI-style SSE chunks into a simpler {'delta':'...'} envelope and always emits a final [DONE] even on errors — robust contract for the frontend.
CORS allow_origin_regex r'https://([a-zA-Z0-9-]+\.)*github\.io' covers user.github.io, custom subdomains, and the apex. allow_credentials=False is correct because frontend uses no cookies.
frontend/src/lib/api.js chatStream() is a clean async generator with AbortController support and a finally{} that cancels the reader — good cancellation semantics.
Chat.jsx flushes streaming deltas every 50ms or 25 chars — keeps React renders manageable while feeling live.

Empty-stream handling: Chat.jsx strips the placeholder bubble and toasts 'respuesta vacía' if finalContent is empty — addresses the iter2 flaky-empty-content RCA from /api/chat/continue (now applied to streaming path too).
config.js: ENV_BACKEND_URL prefers REACT_APP_API_BASE_URL over REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL — good for GH Pages CI/CD without breaking existing Emergent env.
Minor: server.py event_generator has sent_done flag but the finally always emits [DONE] when not sent — correct guard against partial-line buffers.

Note: behavioral change — ALL DeepSeek calls now default to thinking:{type:disabled} via payload.setdefault. Intentional per task description; verified non-streaming endpoints still return high-quality content.
test_credentials: Not applicable — app is localStorage-only with no auth.
seed_data_creation: Used the auto-seeded 'seed-kira' character. Frontend reset between streaming-on and streaming-off tests via fresh send.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 7 regression endpoints + new /api/chat/stream pass. The only header caveat (X-Accel-Buffering stripped by Cloudflare on the preview URL) does NOT affect functionality — streaming chunks arrive at the client just fine. For typewriter verification I polled the largest text-block length inside [data-testid='messages-scroll-area'] every 250ms and counted distinct values (streaming->8 steps, non-streaming->2 steps). Use /#/chat/seed-kira (with hash) — old /chat/seed-kira URL is now invalid under HashRouter. iteration_3 tests live at /app/backend/tests/test_iteration3.py; reuse for any future regression.
